drafted_email:
Hello Whirlpool Support,

I need help with this issue: Ice maker stopped; water still works.. Steps already tried: Check the water-line shutoff valve. Please advise on service options.

Thank you.

inspection_guide.narration: Read out the model number on the plate.
Show any current error code or temperature setting.
Capture the sound or visible symptom.
Say what is wrong and what you already tried.

escalation_steps.instruction: Check that the appliance is plugged in and the outlet has power.
Find the model and serial number on the spec plate and have them ready.
Note the symptom and any error code shown on the display.
Call support to schedule a technician if the issue still is not resolved.

packet.summary: Refrigerator issue: Ice maker stopped; water still works.
